rationale: Gov't Code §2306.052 governs the director's administrative powers and duties over the department. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The director is the administrator and the head of the department and must be an individual qualified by training and experience to perform the duties of the office.
_note: No conflict; the cited rule concerns departmental administration, not property tax exemptions.
